channel.title: League One Kattupakkam - Premium Apartments on Property Scouts - Premium Real Estate in Chennai
channel.description: Recent content in League One Kattupakkam - Premium Apartments on Property Scouts - Premium Real Estate in Chennai

item.title: Affordable Modern Living - League One Pricing & Payment Plans
item.description: Best Value: League One Pricing Modern Living, Affordable Price League One offers the best value in the market. Own a modern apartment from ₹38K/month—less than premium rentals. Crystal Clear Pricing 2BHK Apartment Base Price: ₹58L - ₹62L Price Breakdown (₹58L Example): Property: ₹58L (inclusive) Registration & legal: ~₹1L (buyer covers) Total cost: ₹59L What’s Included: ✅ Modern finishes (paint, modular kitchen, fixtures) ✅ All amenities (gym, pool, yoga, sports court)

item.title: Family Home - League One Kattupakkam
item.description: Homes for Growing Families Where Families Live Well and Children Thrive League One combines safety, affordability, and community. Perfect for families seeking quality living without premium pricing. Why Families Choose League One Good Schools Nearby Schools within 5-10 km: Vidyashilp Academy (CBSE, excellent academics) Sri Kumaran Children’s Home (well-established) Pusa Nivas School (ICSE, known for discipline) Sri Aurobindo Pathamandir (alternative education) Safe Gated Community 24/7 Armed Security with access control CCTV Surveillance in all common areas Visitor Management system Safe Play Areas for kids Recreation for All Ages For Kids:

item.title: Investment Opportunity - League One Kattupakkam
item.description: Smart Investment: League One Kattupakkam Achieve 13-17% Annualized Returns League One offers balanced investment returns with strong rental demand from IT professionals and reliable appreciation in the growing Kattupakkam micro-market. Expected Investment Returns Rental Yield: 8-11% p.a. 2BHK Investment Purchase: ₹58L - ₹62L Monthly Rental: ₹45K - ₹55K Annual: ₹5.4L - ₹6.6L Gross Yield: 8-11% 3BHK Investment Purchase: ₹78L - ₹88L Monthly Rental: ₹60K - ₹75K Annual: ₹7.2L - ₹9L Gross Yield: 8-11% Appreciation: 5-6% Annually Strong market fundamentals in Kattupakkam Emerging tech hub status driving growth Total blended return: 13-17% annualized over 5-10 years 5-Year Investment Projection Year 1: Property value ₹65L | Rental income ₹6L | Total: ₹71L Year 3: Property value ₹74L | Rental income ₹18L | Total: ₹92L Year 5: Property value ₹84L | Rental income ₹30L | Total: ₹114L Exit Analysis (after 5 years): - Sale proceeds: ₹84L - Less: Capital gains tax (20%): -₹4.

item.title: Modern Luxury Living - League One Kattupakkam
item.description: League One: Modern Luxury Redefined Contemporary Design Meets Premium Living League One offers modern luxury without the ultra-premium price tag. Contemporary aesthetics, quality materials, and thoughtful design for discerning buyers. Modern Design Excellence Contemporary Finishes Modern Paint & Materials - Quality throughout Modular Kitchens - Clean lines, functional design Smart Home Ready - Pre-wired for automation Quality Fixtures - Jaquar, Hindware brands Spacious Layouts - Thoughtful space planning Lifestyle Amenities Wellness

item.title: NRI Investment Opportunity - League One Kattupakkam
item.description: League One for NRI Investors Invest from Abroad. Earn in Your Home Currency. No Visit Required. League One is the smart NRI choice—best value, solid yields, and complete remote process. NRI Advantages FPI-Compliant Investment ✅ Fully compliant with foreign investment rules ✅ No government approvals needed ✅ Own unlimited residential properties ✅ Full ownership & inheritance rights 100% Remote Process Video tours (HD quality) E-signature on all documents No India visit required Complete in 15-20 days Excellent Value for NRI Investment ₹58-62L (2BHK) = Best price for yield ₹78-88L (3BHK) = Competitive entry point Lower cost than competing locations Excellent appreciation potential Pricing in Your Currency 2BHK Apartment In USD:

item.title: Perfect Location - League One Kattupakkam
item.description: Strategic Location: Kattupakkam Rising 20-Minute Commute to IT Parks. The Emerging Tech Hub. Kattupakkam is Chennai’s next tech corridor. League One positions you in a strategic growth location with excellent commute and strong appreciation potential. The Connectivity Advantage IT Parks: 20 Minutes Primary Destinations: DLF Cybercity: 20 minutes drive (via express route) TCS Parks: 15-20 minutes Infosys Centers: 20-25 minutes Growing office spaces: 10-15 minutes Commute Benefits: Leave at 8:45 AM, office by 9:05 AM Less congestion than OMR route Multiple exit options Railway Connectivity Railway Station: 15 minutes drive
